full_text:
Gong Zhi 鞏志
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gong Zhi (鞏志). Advised Jin Xuan to surrender. When Jin Xuan returned defeated, Gong Zhi shot him. Gong Zhi is a fictional character. Gong Zhi was affiliated with the Jin Xuan Dynasty and the Shu Kingdom.
